findings.V2_073_reversal_invariant: All 4 metrics use abs() → ALL reversal-invariant. Reverse distance ≈ 0. 0/5 expected.
findings.V2_074_signed_fix: Removed abs() → 2/5. M2 antisymmetric under reversal for centered data.
findings.V2_075_AR1_mismatch: AR(1) unsuitable for quadratic logistic map. M2 near-zero for chaotic_logistic.
findings.V2_076_embedding_bug: Critical: stride tau in embedding range reduces samples from 4088 to 2044. Backward prediction misaligned (uses x[:len] vs correct alignment). Results unreliable.
findings.V2_077_M3_dead: boundary_discontinuity (max/median ratio) near-constant for most signals. Only chaotic_logistic shows variation.
findings.V2_080_3metrics: 3 metrics with same distance thresholds as 4-metric versions. Fewer dims → smaller L2 → harder to pass.
findings.V2_081_global_corr_bug: multi-seed correlation collection always appends 0 (if False bug). Global corr uses only seed 79.
findings.corr_gate_small_sample_bias: With 5 samples and 4 metrics, ~22% chance of |r|>0.90 by chance. corr<0.90 overfits to small N.
findings.normalization_leakage: RobustScaler fitted on all 25 samples. Per-domain distances reflect cross-domain scaling.
findings.consistent_sign: Across all valid versions, linear classifiers (LDA, 1-NN) achieve >60% accuracy but scalar gate achieves <70% of that → gate geometry is the bottleneck.
